race.comment: Tricky race this, though INTO THE FIRE (6) looks an improver getting back to the scene of his last win here three starts ago. The form out of that worked out well and this looks to shape similarly. Can jump to the front with Guymer on board and if he can bounce back to his best form, he'll take catching. BABY DAISY (5) finished strongly when jumping poorly here three starts back and has been in good order since without winning. The inside draw should see her get every chance under the leading jock Boudvillain and she'll be poised to strike in running. BEAU ROCK (4) comes here off a freshen but did jump a $6.50 chance in a similar race before the break. He's a consistent galloper at this level and his record at this track and trip is strong. The apprentice claim helps and he won't be far away on resumption. THE MOOCH (7) is on the quick turnaround from Dubbo on Sunday and should appreciate the drop in grade. INSANE VOLT (1) has to be included off a good win at Nowra 33 days ago.
